rationale: Educ. Code §39.054 governs school district and campus performance rating methods. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13. No textual conflict exists.
quote: the commissioner shall adopt rules to evaluate school district and campus performance and, each school year, assign each district and campus an overall performance rating of A, B, C, D, or F.
_note: No conflict. §39.054 addresses accountability ratings, not tax exemptions. Indirect fiscal effects on school districts are not textual conflicts with this statute.
